purpose: Start source-safe racecourse profile enrichment with Tokyo Racecourse by recording official-source candidates before editing the public racecourse dataset.

official_source_candidates.role: Existing JRA official root link already used by the Tokyo Racecourse record.
Candidate official Tokyo Racecourse facility page for future source-safe course profile enrichment.
official_source_candidates.safe_use: candidate link and page-role confirmation only

promotion_decision.next_required_step: Browser-confirm the candidate facility page role, then add a source registry record and racecourse official link in a follow-up PR.

forward_schedule.goal: Confirm the candidate official facility URL and page role without collecting prohibited racecard or betting data.
If confirmed, add the source registry entry and racecourse official link.
If official page content is confirmed, add conservative profile notes without numeric claims unless explicitly source-verified.
